title: ferray-io: parse numpy structured dtype descriptors and load into FerrayRecord arrays
description: Follow-up split out from #490. Extend ferray-io/src/npy/dtype_parse.rs to parse numpy structured dtype descriptors like [('x','<f4'),('y','<f4')] and either map to an existing DType::Struct via runtime FieldDescriptor lookup, or surface as a typed FerrayRecord load path.
